summary: Excellent matrix mix delivers crystal‑clear soundboard detail plus the gut‑punch of audience ambience, capturing a great Dead show.
review: The reviewer praises the performance as a "great show" and highlights the superb matrix recording that blends the clarity of the soundboard with the punchy feel of the crowd. The mix is described as well‑balanced and enjoyable, making this release stand out for both musical and technical reasons.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review lauds both the show and the matrix recording, indicating a top‑tier experience despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear soundboard (SBD) fidelity combined with the gut‑punch of audience (AUD); praised as a great mix with superb clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer calls it a "great show" but provides no specific details on set structure.
